case_name: S.R. Bommai v. Union of India
summary: Limited arbitrary use of Article 356 and held that majority should ordinarily be tested on the legislative floor.

case_name: Nabam Rebia and Bamang Felix v. Deputy Speaker
summary: Restricted unilateral gubernatorial discretion in legislative functioning and emphasized constitutional limits on intervention.

case_name: Rameshwar Prasad (VI) v. Union of India
summary: Found dissolution of the Bihar Assembly unconstitutional and cautioned against speculative gubernatorial reports.
